title: activate_subscription uses parsed invoice expiry not promised duration for late payments
description: In payment_watcher::activate_subscription, when a payment arrives after invoice expiry, the new expiry is max(parsed_invoice_expires_at, now + fallback_days). fallback_days comes from invoice.subscription_days which is the duration requested at invoice time. However, parsed_invoice_expires_at was computed at invoice-creation time as creation_time + duration_days, so for an expired invoice the max() correctly picks now + duration_days. BUT: on a parse failure of expires_at (the Err branch), fallback_days is also used for both the fallback and the max — so the code is correct in both branches. No bug here after close reading.
close_reason: false positive: logic correct after close reading
